title: Opening for Software Engineer at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Software Engineer in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!
